chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-958 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 08-12-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **** On 03.12.2025, the following order was passed: “None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. Under the circumstances, this petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 08.12.2025, for which intimation notice be issued to the petitioner’s counsel”. Today, none appeared on behalf of petitioner; no intimation is received though notice of intimation was sent to counsel for petitioner for today’s date of hearing. Even office objections have not been complied with, which reflects that either the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing this matter or the purpose for which instant petition was filed, has been achieved. Accordingly, instant Constitutional Petition along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
